description_long: This clock tower features a dark, polished wooden structure with ornate carvings and a prominent, decorative crown at the top. The front face displays a single round clock with a white dial, black numerals, and two black hands, set within a glass panel that reveals some of the internal clockwork. The base is sturdy and slightly flared, with small decorative feet. The sides are solid wood with subtle carved embellishments, while the back is plain and unadorned. The overall design is reminiscent of traditional European public building clock towers, with a focus on craftsmanship and classic detailing. The roof is a stylized, gabled wooden cap with intricate scrollwork.
description: A dark, ornately carved wooden clock tower with a single round clock face, glass front panel, and a decorative gabled crown.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round clock face, glass panel, and ornate wooden crown.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the structure and carved wooden details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned wooden back and the shape of the crown.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with similar carved details and the profile of the crown.
attribute_clock_face_design: The clock face is round with a white background, black Arabic numerals, and two black hands. It is encased in glass and surrounded by a metallic bezel. The design is simple and functional, with no additional decorative elements on the face itself.
